hints.description: This company is a leading health insurance organization, primarily serving Medicare Advantage beneficiaries, plus offering commercial health plans and pharmacy solutions. They provide a wide range of healthcare services, including medical, dental, vision, and behavioral health, aiming to simplify and improve the healthcare experience. Founded by David A. Jones, the company has grown significantly through acquisitions and organic growth, becoming a major player in the U.S. healthcare landscape.
hints.funFact1: In 1993, the company acquired *******, a large physician practice management company, which at the time was the largest such acquisition in the healthcare industry.
hints.funFact2: The company’s name comes from the Latin word "******," meaning "humane," reflecting their commitment to providing compassionate and patient-centered care.
